heading: Seal of National Film Registry
label: 179q Seal of National Film Registry
notes: Amendments2005—Subsec. (a)(1). , inserted “in any format” after “or any copy” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 109–9, § 302(d)(1)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “in any format” for “or film copy”.Pub. L. 109–9, § 302(d)(2)
amendments: Amendments2005—Subsec. (a)(1). , inserted “in any format” after “or any copy” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 109–9, § 302(d)(1)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “in any format” for “or film copy”.Pub. L. 109–9, § 302(d)(2)

children.label: A
children.text: is not included in the National Film Registry; or

children.label: B
children.text: is included in the National Film Registry, but such film or film copy has not been approved for use of the seal by the Librarian pursuant to .section 179m(a)(1)(D) of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on promotion
children.label: 2 Prohibition on promotion
children.text: No person shall knowingly use the seal described in to promote any version of a film in any format other than a Registry version.section 179m(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: Effective date of seal
children.label: b Effective date of seal
children.text: The use of the seal described in shall be effective for each film after the Librarian publishes in the Federal Register, in accordance with , the name of that film as selected for inclusion in the National Film Registry.section 179m(a)(3) of this titlesection 179m(a)(2) of this title
